title: Genomic RNA Extraction by TRIzol Method Using Drosophila melanogaster Gut
author: Mohamed Sabeelil Islam
materials: discard the supernatant and retain the pellet

steps.title: Dissection was used to isolate the...
steps.instruction: Dissection was used to isolate the larval gut of Drosophila 3rd Instar. (around 10-15 gut was taken)

steps.title: The dissected gut was taken in a 1
steps.instruction: The dissected gut was taken in a 1.5ml ependorf tube which contained 200μL of TRIzol. (For a total of 800μL or 0.8 mL of TRIzol needed for the extraction)To avoid spurt, 200μL were taken.

steps.title: Add 600μL or 0
steps.instruction: Add 600μL or 0.6mL of TRIzol followed up by adding 200μL or 0.2mL of Chloroform (after adding vortex it) and keep it for 5 minutes incubation

steps.title: Take supernatant into new tube and...
steps.instruction: Take supernatant into new tube and add equal amount of isopropanol

steps.title: wash the pellet by using 1ml...
steps.instruction: wash the pellet by using 1ml of 75% cold ethanol (twice) (after adding ethanol vortex the solution and centrifuge at 7500x for 5 minutes)

steps.title: Retain the pellet, add RNase free...
steps.instruction: Retain the pellet, add RNase free water and check the purity
